title: sticherus × leonis
intro: Sticherus × leonis, also known as Sticherus leonis, is a hybrid plant species belonging to the family Marattiaceae, which is a type of fern native to New Zealand. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma due to its anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Sticherus × leonis include reducing inflammation, relieving coughs and congestion, and soothing irritated tissues in the lungs and airways. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
